name: proc_creation_win_powershell_import_module_susp_dirs
raw_query: any where process.command_line like~ ("*Import-Module \"$Env:Temp\\*", "*Import-Module '$Env:Temp\\*", "*Import-Module $Env:Temp\\*", "*Import-Module \"$Env:Appdata\\*", "*Import-Module '$Env:Appdata\\*", "*Import-Module $Env:Appdata\\*", "*Import-Module C:\\Users\\Public\\*", "*ipmo \"$Env:Temp\\*", "*ipmo '$Env:Temp\\*", "*ipmo $Env:Temp\\*", "*ipmo \"$Env:Appdata\\*", "*ipmo '$Env:Appdata\\*", "*ipmo $Env:Appdata\\*", "*ipmo C:\\Users\\Public\\*")
